{"path":"reverse_string.py","content":"def reverse_string(s):
    return s[::-1]

# Example usage:
if __name__ == "__main__":
    original = "hello"
    reversed_str = reverse_string(original)
    print(f"Original: {original}")
    print(f"Reversed: {reversed_str}")"}
